body:
Hi team,

We're moving our deployment window from Thursdays at 2pm to Tuesdays at 10am starting next week. This gives us more runway before the weekend to catch issues. Please update your calendars and let me know if this conflicts with any standing meetings.
expected: Deploy window moving to Tuesdays at 10am

body: We've just shipped v3.2 which includes the API rate limiting you requested, webhook retry logic, and a new dashboard for monitoring usage. The migration guide is attached. Breaking change: the /v2/events endpoint is now deprecated and will be removed in v4.0.
expected: v3.2 released: rate limiting, webhook retries, and usage dashboard

body: After reviewing Q3 results, we're adjusting our 2024 roadmap. The AI features originally planned for Q1 are being pulled forward to Q4 this year. We'll need to reallocate 3 engineers from the platform team. I'd like to discuss trade-offs in our Thursday leadership sync.
expected: Roadmap shift: pulling AI features into Q4

body: Your trial expires in 3 days. You've created 12 projects and invited 4 team members — your team is getting real value from the platform. Upgrade now to keep everything running. Use code LAUNCH20 for 20% off your first year.
expected: Your trial ends in 3 days — keep your 12 projects running

body: We identified a vulnerability in our authentication service that could allow session tokens to be reused after logout. A patch has been deployed to production. No customer data was exposed. We recommend all users log out and back in. Full incident report will follow within 24 hours.
expected: Security patch deployed for session token issue

body: Thanks for interviewing with us last week. The team really enjoyed our conversation about distributed systems. We'd like to extend an offer for the Senior Backend Engineer role. I've attached the details — compensation, equity, benefits, and start date options. Happy to jump on a call to walk through everything.
expected: We'd like to offer you the Senior Backend Engineer role

body: Quick update: we hit 10,000 paying customers today. Revenue is up 34% QoQ. Churn dropped to 2.1%. The product-led growth motion is working — 68% of new customers convert from free tier without talking to sales. Full metrics deck attached for the board meeting.

I noticed you've been shipping features every day for the past two weeks. The code quality has been solid and the team has commented on how well-documented your PRs are. Just wanted to say — great work. It doesn't go unnoticed.
expected: Your work lately has been outstanding

body: We're sunsetting the legacy REST API on March 1st. All integrations need to migrate to GraphQL by then. We've built a migration tool that handles 90% of cases automatically. Documentation and office hours schedule are linked below. Please start migration this month to avoid disruption.
expected: REST API sunset March 1st — migration tool now available

body: Our monitoring detected that response times on the /search endpoint have degraded from p99 of 200ms to 1.2s over the past 4 hours. Root cause appears to be an unindexed query introduced in yesterday's deploy. Rolling back now. Will post RCA tomorrow.
expected: /search p99 latency at 1.2s — rolling back now

body: We just closed our Series B — $45M led by Sequoia with participation from a]16z and existing investors. This gives us 3+ years of runway. We'll be hiring aggressively across engineering, product, and go-to-market. More details in the all-hands tomorrow.
expected: We raised $45M Series B — details at tomorrow's all-hands

body: I'm writing to let you know that I've decided to leave the company. My last day will be February 28th. This wasn't an easy decision — I've learned so much here and I'm grateful for the opportunities. I'll make sure to document everything and help with the transition over the next two weeks.
